svg.text: • 547. Number of Provinces — union connected cities, count roots
• 200. Number of Islands — Union-Find on grid (alternative to BFS / DFS)
• 305. Number of Islands II — online additions; only Union-Find scales
• 323. Number of Connected Components — direct application
• 1971. Find if Path Exists — union edges, query connected
• 261. Graph Valid Tree — connected and no cycle
• 684. Redundant Connection — first edge whose union returns false
• 685. Redundant Connection II — directed; combine with parent check
• 1584. Min Cost to Connect All Points — Kruskal MST
• 1135. Connecting Cities With Minimum Cost — Kruskal MST
• 721. Accounts Merge — union accounts sharing emails
• 990. Satisfiability of Equality Equations — equivalences then check inequalities
